response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified Ayunda Risu talking about birthday/merchandise (00:00-03:05). 2. Detected performance of '星が降る' (03:05-04:38). 3. Searched for lyrics for 'Ayunda Risu Hoshiga Furu'. 4. Located lyrics and translation, constructed JSON.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Ayunda Risu discussing her birthday and merchandise, followed by a vocal performance of her original song '星が降る' (Hoshiga Furu), and ending with credits.

scenes.description: Ayunda Risu introduces her birthday and merchandise. No vocal music.
Ayunda Risu performs her song '星が降る'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
羽のないこの私が憧れてたあの空
背伸びして星を掴む真似をしてみた
負けないで願いさえも呑み込む闇それでも
手探りで夢の欠片集めに行こうよ

ただグルグル回る車輪の中で
走っても走っても辿り着けなくて
先を行く君の背中ばかりを見ていた
いつか越えられる
もっと強くなりたい

たったひとり生まれてきたその記憶もなくして
泣き声も届かないと嘆いてみても
信じていい大きな木にしがみついた爪痕
あの空へ近づこうとしている証し

風が雲を流して
星が降る

羽のないこの私が憧れてたあの空 (心には羽があるから)
背伸びして星を掴む真似をしてみた (確かめたいah夢を)
負けないで願いさえも呑み込む闇それでも (だから負けないで)
手探りで夢の欠片集めに行こうよ (私に今星が降るよ)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The sky I, without wings, longed for
I tried imitating stretching to grab the stars
Don't give up, even if the darkness swallows my wishes
Let's go, fumbling to gather fragments of dreams

In the wheel just spinning around and around
Running and running, I couldn't reach it
I was only looking at your back as you went ahead
Someday I can overcome it
I want to be stronger

Having been born all alone, losing even that memory
Even if I lament that my crying voice won't reach
Believe it, the claw marks I clung to on the big tree
They are proof that I am trying to get closer to that sky

The wind flows the clouds
Stars are falling

The sky I, without wings, longed for (because I have wings in my heart)
I tried imitating stretching to grab the stars (I want to confirm, ah, the dream)
Don't give up, even if the darkness swallows my wishes (so don't give up)
Let's go, fumbling to gather fragments of dreams (stars are falling on me now)
